description: Curated developing-countries (educational perspective) segment. Each entry is benchmarked against one geographic neighbor and one size-matched aspirational peer. Pairings are interpretive choices, documented here; the dashboard comparison is descriptive, not a ranking verdict.

criteria_flag.rule: EPI below median AND positive 5y delta AND limited system size (total tertiary enrollment below the 40th percentile of the snapshot)
criteria_flag.note: Countries meeting the rule are auto-flagged into the developing segment in addition to the curated list below.

watchlist.name: Malta
watchlist.rationale: Small EU island state; Italy is the nearest advanced neighbor, Estonia a size-matched digital-forward peer.

watchlist.name: Georgia
watchlist.rationale: South Caucasus; Turkey is the large advanced neighbor, Estonia a small post-Soviet reform peer.
